[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00011101 4
1 00011110 4
2 00011000 2
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 00000000 a
7 10001100 3
